results.title: Apple Is Said to Owe Back Taxes to Irish Government
results.abstract: The potential clawback, estimated to be hundreds of millions of dollars, may stoke tensions between American and European officials over tax policies.
results.byline: By MARK SCOTT and JAMES KANTER

results.title: Uber and Alphabet’s Rivalry Heats Up as Director Chooses Sides
results.abstract: David Drummond’s having a hand in each company became untenable as the two converge on mapping technologies, ride sharing and autonomous cars.

results.title: Shooting Scares Show a Nation Quick to Fear the Worst
results.abstract: False alarms around the country indicate that Americans are primed, when they hear a loud bang or see signs of panic, to think in terms of mass killings.
results.byline: By RICHARD PÉREZ-PEÑA, JACK HEALY and JENNIFER MEDINA

results.title: G.E., the 124-Year-Old Software Start-Up
